notes: Town PDF zoning_bylaws_october_2025.pdf (walpole-ma.gov, CURRENT) §4 Establishment of Districts: R/RA/RB/GR/PSRC residential-public, B/CBD/HB/LM/IND commercial. MAPC layer 2 strip 307-prefix maps 1:1 to ordinance codes (no code_map). NOTE assessor used 'HBD' for Highway Business; ordinance + MAPC both use 'HB' — rebind supersedes the assessor label. Overlays (FPPOD/SEP/SPOD/WRPOD/MCMOD/EWCPROD) excluded from base rebind.
